case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS VS. FLORES STEEL CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS AS TO RESPONDENT FLORES STEEL CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES I TO X, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD ; MEMO OF P AND A;DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS SERVED JUL-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES STEEL CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-28-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
